:memo: *Data Quality Notes*
• `JUN616XTEEN` slug is `首頁` ("homepage") — appears to be a template placeholder, not a valid slug
• `SMOK 製甜所` `purchase_website` has a trailing `?` → smokcafe.com/? (malformed URL, works but should be trimmed)

*DB Health*
Top tables: `brands` (9.2 MB), `storage.objects` (4.9 MB), `brand_search_results` (3.7 MB)
Connections: 1 active / 16 idle / 0 idle-in-txn — healthy

  • `brand_owners` 4700% (47 dead) | `brand_submissions` 2250% (45 dead) | `newsletter_subscribers` 2800% (28 dead) + 6 more tables
